ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "zestimate" REAL /* Estimated value of the property (Zestimate) */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "baths" REAL /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "sqft" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "lot_size_sqft" INTEGER /* Size of the lot in square feet */,
  "garage_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of garage spaces */,
  "basement" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the property has a basement */,
  "roof_material" TEXT /* Material of the roof */,
  "heating_type" TEXT /* Type of heating */,
  "cooling_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "year_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., active, pending, sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nearby_homes" (
  "nearby_home_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nearby home */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property this home is nearby */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the nearby home */,
  "zestimate" REAL /* Estimated value of the nearby home (Zestimate) */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the nearby home */,
  "baths" REAL /* Number of bathrooms in the nearby home */,
  "sqft" INTEGER /* Square footage of the nearby home */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the nearby home was built */,
  "lot_size_sqft" INTEGER /* Size of the lot in square feet */,
  "garage_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of garage spaces */,
  "basement" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the nearby home has a basement */,
  "roof_material" TEXT /* Material of the roof */,
  "heating_type" TEXT /* Type of heating */,
  "cooling_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the nearby home */,
  "year_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the nearby home was last renovated */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Status of the nearby home (e.g., active, pending, sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nearby_home_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nearby_homes_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Average tax rate for the property type */,
  "average_price_sqft" REAL /* Average price per square foot for the property type */,
  "average_sqft" REAL /* Average square footage for the property type */,
  "average_beds" REAL /* Average number of bedrooms for the property type */,
  "average_baths" REAL /* Average number of bathrooms for the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Agent's license number */,
  "office" TEXT /* Name of the office the agent works in */,
  "years_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being listed */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent listing the property */,
  "list_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "list_price" REAL /* List price of the property */,
  "listing_status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., active, pending, sold) */,
  "listing_type" TEXT /* Type of listing (e.g., exclusive, shared) */,
  "listing_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the listing */,
  "marketing_expense" REAL /* Estimated marketing expenses for the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_listings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_listings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "buyer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the buyer */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was finalized */,
  "closing_costs" REAL /* Total closing costs */,
  "financing_type" TEXT /* Type of financing used (e.g., cash, mortgage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES property_listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role this permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property this image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "open_houses" (
  "open_house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each open house event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property this event belongs to */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the open house event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the open house event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the open house event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the open house event */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the open house */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("open_house_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_houses_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property this note belongs to */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., general, critical) */,
  "note_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the note (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_notes_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the property */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the property was viewed */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the property has been viewed */,
  "last_view_date" TEXT /* Date of the last view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who saved the favorite */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property that is a favorite */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date the property was added to favorites */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note about why the property was added to favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "property_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first property being compared */,
  "property_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second property being compared */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date the comparison was made */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., price, size) */,
  "comparison_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_comparisons_property_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("property_id2") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_comparisons_property_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("property_id1") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
